summary: Walk-in Sale & Account Mapping testing complete. All 11 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: Walk-in Sale page at /admin/walk-in-sale renders with cart, customer (Individual/Business toggle), payment sections. Walk-in Sale shows in admin sidebar under COMMERCE. Track Order page shows 6-step lifecycle (regression verified).
seed_data_creation: Created test walk-in orders: WLK-20260412-7C6D05 (30000 TZS), plus additional test orders during pytest
context_for_next_testing_agent: Walk-in Sale & Account Mapping verified. Key features: (1) POST /api/admin/walk-in-sale creates order+invoice+payment in one step, returns order_number (WLK-*), invoice_number, total. (2) Walk-in orders have status=completed, closure_locked=true, sales_channel=walk_in, is_walk_in=true, closure_method=confirmed_in_person, sales_contribution_type=assisted. (3) Business validation: client_type=business requires business_name, vrn, brn. (4) Empty items returns 400. (5) Walk-in Sale page at /admin/walk-in-sale has product search, cart, customer section (Individual/Business toggle with VRN/BRN fields for business), payment section (method dropdown, amount received, reference). (6) Walk-in Sale link in sidebar under COMMERCE with CreditCard icon. (7) Account mapping in /api/auth/register links historical orders/invoices/delivery_notes by phone_normalized last 9 digits. (8) Track Order page shows 6-step lifecycle: Order Placed → Confirmed → In Progress → Ready/Dispatched → Awaiting Confirmation → Completed.

details: POST /api/admin/walk-in-sale creates order, invoice, payment in one step
Response includes order_number (WLK-*), invoice_number, total, currency, status
Order has status=completed, closure_locked=true, sales_channel=walk_in
Order has is_walk_in=true, closure_method=confirmed_in_person, sales_contribution_type=assisted
Empty items returns 400 with 'At least one item is required'
Business client without VRN/BRN returns 400 with validation error
Business client with all fields (business_name, vrn, brn) succeeds
Walk-in Sale page loads at /admin/walk-in-sale
Product search input present (data-testid='product-search')
Cart section present (data-testid='cart-section')
Customer section present with Individual/Business toggle
Business toggle shows VRN, BRN, Business Name fields
Payment section present with method dropdown, amount received, reference
Complete Sale button present (data-testid='complete-sale-btn')
Walk-in Sale link in sidebar under COMMERCE
Registration endpoint /api/auth/register exists
Registration with phone creates user successfully
Account mapping logic in server.py links orders/invoices/delivery_notes by phone_normalized last 9 digits
Track Order page loads at /track-order
6-step lifecycle displayed: Order Placed → Confirmed → In Progress → Ready/Dispatched → Awaiting Confirmation → Completed
Completion details shown: Receiver, Method (Confirmed In Person), Completed date
Walk-in orders trackable by WLK-* order number
GET /api/admin/catalog/products returns products list for walk-in sale product search
